title: 71 [Khalid b. Abdallah Raises Support for Abd al-Malik in al-Basrah
description: `Abd al-Malik in a]-Ba.srahJ According to `Umar b. Shabbah-`Ali b. Muhammad [al-Mada'ini), who said: `Abd al- Malik came from Syria intending to fight Mus`ab. (This happened prior to this year, in the year 7o.) With him was Khalid b. `Abdallah b. Khalid b. Asid. Khalid said to Abd al -Malik, " If you send me to al-Basrah and have a few horsemen follow me, I hope to subdue it for you." `Abd al-Malik sent him. Khalid arrived there clandestinely with his mawdli and close associates, and stayed at the home of `Amr b. Asma` alBahili. According to Umar [b.

sources.citation: al-Tabari, The History of al-Tabari (SUNY), vol. 21
